name: Freshpet, Inc.
business: Freshpet manufactures, markets, and distributes fresh dog food, cat food, and dog treats. Its products are sold through a network of company-owned branded refrigerators (Freshpet Fridges) in approximately 30,235 retail stores. The company sells to grocery, mass, international, digital, pet specialty, and club classes of retail.

exposures.sentence: Freshpet, Inc. is disrupting the over $56.0 billion United States pet food industry by driving consumers to reassess conventional dog and cat food offerings that have remained essentially unchanged for decades.
Digital orders include any purchases made online, including our direct-to-consumer business, and may also be fulfilled by our Freshpet Fridge network in brick and mortar stores.

tamClaims.claim: United States pet food industry size
tamClaims.sentence: Freshpet, Inc. is disrupting the over $56.0 billion United States pet food industry by driving consumers to reassess conventional dog and cat food offerings that have remained essentially unchanged for decades.

tamClaims.claim: Number of dog or cat food buying households in the United States
tamClaims.sentence: There are currently approximately 98 million dog or cat food buying households in the United States, meaning that approximately 73% of total households are buying dog and/or cat food, according to Numerator.
